productName: Grapefruit Romulan ( I ) - Flipside Gold BHO/Ethanol Extracted Disposable 1g
description: A grab-and-go hybrid disposable of Grapefruit Romulan, the simplest way to vape: flavorful, portable, and zero setup required. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of grapefruit, citrus, and diesel, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
